summary: Phase 2B testing completed: CompetitionPulse component + Style Remix cards + Accordion continuation. All 21 backend API tests passed. Frontend code review confirms correct implementation. UI testing limited due to post-gen phase requiring READY state stories.
critical_code_review_comments: CompetitionPulse.jsx (lines 12-174): Correctly implements live rank display with 20s polling, winner state (rank=1) with celebration + View Battle/View Chain CTAs, competitor state with rank number + gap-to-#1 + Try Again/Beat #1 CTAs, and rank change alerts (emerald for up, rose for down)
StoryVideoPipeline.js (lines 2419-2433): CompetitionPulse correctly integrated between primary buttons and secondary actions, with onTryAgain and onBeatTop callbacks wired to openPresetContinuation
StoryVideoPipeline.js (lines 2674-2699): Style remix cards (Anime, 3D, Watercolor, etc.) correctly open ContinuationModal with style-specific instruction via openPresetContinuation
StoryVideoPipeline.js (lines 2613-2671): Accordion continuation options correctly use openPresetContinuation instead of old handleContinue
StoryVideoPipeline.js (lines 2711-2716): Create Entirely New Story button correctly fires create_new_story_clicked analytics event via api.post('/api/funnel/track')
ContinuationModal.jsx (lines 20, 27-35): Correctly handles preset prop - pre-fills title and instruction fields when preset is provided

All data-testid attributes properly implemented: competition-pulse, winner-state, competitor-state, rank-up-alert, rank-down-alert, pulse-try-again, pulse-beat-top, pulse-view-battle, pulse-view-chain

success_rate.frontend: Code review verified - UI elements only visible in post-gen READY state

seed_data_creation: None - used existing battle-demo-root chain with branches from both admin and test user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2B features are correctly implemented. CompetitionPulse only renders when battle.user_rank exists (user has participated in the battle). The post-gen phase buttons (Add Twist, Make Funny, Next Episode, style remix cards, accordion options) are only visible when a story is in READY state. Story Battle page (/app/story-battle/{id}) shows full leaderboard with ranks, scores, views, continues. Story Chain Timeline (/app/story-chain-timeline/{id}) shows episode timeline with branches. All backend endpoints working: /api/stories/battle/{id}, /api/stories/increment-metric, /api/funnel/track, /api/stories/continue-episode, /api/stories/continue-branch.

backend_tests_summary.TestBattleEndpoint: 4 tests passed - battle endpoint exists, works with auth, response structure valid, user_rank calculation correct
backend_tests_summary.TestBattleContenderFields: 3 tests passed - contenders have battle_score, total_children, creator_name
backend_tests_summary.TestBattleRanking: 2 tests passed - contenders sorted by score desc, have rank field
backend_tests_summary.TestIncrementMetric: 3 tests passed - increment views, increment shares, invalid metric rejected
backend_tests_summary.TestFunnelTracking: 4 tests passed - create_new_story_clicked, style_remix_clicked, pulse_try_again_clicked, pulse_beat_top_clicked events tracked
backend_tests_summary.TestContinuationEndpoints: 2 tests passed - continue-episode and continue-branch endpoints exist
backend_tests_summary.TestDiscoverFeed: 2 tests passed - discover and trending feeds return stories

frontend_verification.Story Battle Page: Verified - Shows 'You're #1!' winner state, Battle Leaderboard with 4 competing versions, ranks, scores (216.4, 195.8, 163.2, 132.0 pts), views, continues, 'Think you can do better?' CTA
frontend_verification.Story Video Studio: Verified - Animation style cards visible (2D Cartoon, Anime, 3D Animation, Watercolor, Comic Book, Claymation)
frontend_verification.Story Viewer Page: Verified - Create Episode and Fork/Remix buttons visible, View Story Battle button visible
frontend_verification.Story Chain Timeline: Verified - Shows 3 episodes, 3 branches, Depth 2, 'Beat This Version' CTA, episode timeline with Origin, Ep 1, Ep 2
